description_long: This is a plush brown bear stuffed toy with a rounded body and limbs, featuring a lighter tan oval patch on its belly and a matching tan snout. The bear has two round, black button-like eyes and a small, triangular black nose, giving it a simple and friendly appearance. Its ears are small, rounded, and positioned symmetrically on top of its head. The surface texture appears to be soft and slightly ribbed, typical of a fabric material. The toy's arms and legs are short and stubby, extending outward from its body. There are no visible seams, clothing, or accessories, and the back is plain brown with no additional markings.
description: A soft, brown plush bear with a tan belly patch, black button eyes, and a simple, friendly face. The toy has a rounded body, short limbs, and a ribbed fabric texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, tan belly patch, black eyes, and nose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bear's profile, protruding snout, and rounded limbs.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain brown surface and the back of the head and limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bear's profile, similar to the left side, with visible snout and limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with round black eyes and a small, simple black nose. There is no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms and legs slightly spread outward, head facing forward.
